Niu Gai ÁČõŤďč
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Niu Gai (ÁČõŤďč). Also known as śúĪŤďč Zhu Gai. Helped defeat Chen Lan in 209. Accompanied Xu Huang to Fan. Niu Gai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
